description: Create a formal business letter using Apache OpenOffice Writer with the following content: a letterhead for 'Red Hat, Inc.' (100 East Davie Street, Raleigh, NC 27601), the date 'February 3, 2026', and a recipient address for 'Mr. Arvind Krishna' (Chairman and CEO, IBM Corporation, 1 New Orchard Road, Armonk, NY 10504). Use the salutation 'Dear Mr. Krishna,' and write a body of at least three sentences regarding an open source collaboration initiative discussing enterprise Linux and cloud technology partnership opportunities. Include the closing 'Respectfully,' and a signature block for 'Matt Hicks' (President and CEO, Red Hat, Inc.). Save the document to /home/ga/Documents/partnership_letter.odt.

metadata.real_data_note: All company names, addresses, and executive names are from publicly available information. Red Hat was acquired by IBM in 2019. Matt Hicks is Red Hat CEO since 2022. Arvind Krishna is IBM CEO since 2020.
metadata.initial_state: Desktop with OpenOffice Writer NOT running - agent must launch the application
